records.ety: [OE. antartik, OF. antartique, F. antarctique, L. antarcticus, fr. Gr. <?/; 'anti` + 'a`rktos bear. See Arctic.]

defs: Opposite to the northern or arctic pole; relating to the southern pole or to the region near it, and applied especially to a circle, distant from the pole 23° 28. Thus we say the antarctic pole, circle, ocean, region, current, etc.
